puzzle0.title: MEMORY RECONSTRUCTION
puzzle0.description: Search previous records and identify the missing crew member.

event3.text: He said you already saw the name.

event6.text: Then the answer must be somewhere in the archives.

event8.text: And I really hate when the archives start acting smug.

event1.title: CORRUPTED MANIFEST FRAGMENT
event1.content:
CREW MEMBER #07
STATUS: REDACTED
SURNAME: V---
event1.caption: Partially recovered crew record from corrupted personnel database.
event1.message: [CORRUPTED MANIFEST FRAGMENT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event5.text: I don't remember anyone with a V surname on ECHO.

event4.text: That file was deleted for a reason.

event6.text: And no, before Maya says it, not because I'm secretly dramatic.

event0.title: MAINTENANCE LOG
event0.content:
Relay inspection completed.
Signal bleed detected on emergency carrier.
Manual reset recommended.

Signed: N. Voss
event0.caption: Recovered relay maintenance entry with partial signature.

event4.text: No. I would remember that signature.

event3.text: Crew seven. Surname Voss. First initial N.

event1.title: NOAH VOSS
event1.content:
NOAH VOSS
ROLE: COMMUNICATIONS SPECIALIST
CLEARANCE LEVEL: OMEGA
STATUS: UNKNOWN
TRANSFER STATUS: DENIED
event1.caption: Reconstructed personnel profile from fragmented archive records.
event1.message: [NOAH VOSS PROFILE ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event6.text: I know I keep saying that.

event8.text: I would love for one thing today to be possible.

event1.text: Because Noah Voss never boarded the station.

event4.text: His transfer request was denied weeks before launch.

event6.text: I remember Rivera making a joke about it.

event8.text: Something about communications specialists being terrible at communicating with HR.

event6.text: I was the first voice you heard.
